reviews.name: RC.
reviews.title: From Discord
reviews.text: The service was done with minimal setbacks and within deadlines. The art was amazing and I loved the art style.I loved working together with you and whenever I work with pixel art again I'll be sure to come back for your services.

reviews.name: Spindart
reviews.title: From Discord
reviews.text: 1) I liked the art style and how you can make changes based on feedback.2) I liked how prompt you were in responding.3) I did wish you were a bit more clear in communication as there was some confusion with pricing. But overall, it was a good experience.

reviews.name: Generic Scout
reviews.title: From Discord
reviews.text: 1) For my purposes, they were very affordable for bulk assets.2) Most artists I've seen would charge much more. For the most part, I'm happy with what I bought.

reviews.name: Magnus
reviews.title: From Discord
reviews.text: I love the art, and it was done in just over 24h after first contact. Kiri was also very lenient on the price and a great person overall!

reviews.name: Snowy
reviews.title: From Discord
reviews.text: I've been following Kiri's work for a while and finally commissioned a piece. It exceeded all my expectations! Absolutely beautiful.

reviews.name: Trainer
reviews.title: From Discord
reviews.text: I got stuck making my game because I wasn't happy with my ability to make a key asset, and I couldn't find anything that I was looking for on marketplaces that fit the bill. I saw that Kiri was advertising commissions and reached out - Kiri asked effective questions about what I was looking for and gathered some references, and in a reasonable timeframe delivered an asset that's better than what I had in my head, while remaining thematically appropriate! I love it .Thanks, Kiri!
